errors.crashRecovery.descriptionPrefix: Copy or export diagnostics first, then click
errors.crashRecovery.moduleImportFailure: A frontend module resource failed to load. Click "Force resource refresh" first so the app requests the latest modules again. If it keeps happening, clear
errors.crashRecovery.message.diagnosticC: Diagnostics copied; you can send them to the developers
errors.crashRecovery.message.workspacePa: Could not extract the workspace path from the error message
errors.crashRecovery.confirm.clearDiagno:
Clear old diagnostics?

This deletes local crash cache, invocation traces, Workspace repair records, historical log files, and raw response files.

This cannot be undone.
errors.crashRecovery.message.diagnosticH: Old diagnostics cleared; future copies will only include new diagnostic data

errors.artifactFallback.report.heading: === Artifact render error report ===

errors.htmlRenderer.error.emptyOrInvalid: HTML content is empty or invalid

errors.mermaidRenderer.streamingPlacehol: Wait for generation to finish before previewing.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.frontendCras: frontend_crash_buffer is empty: no uncaught frontend exceptions were detected; business errors handled by the UI will not appear here.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.invokeErrorB: invoke_error_buffer only records failed calls; use invoke_trace_buffer for recent successful and failed command traces.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.persistedLog: persisted_log_tail currently contains only {{count}} lines; this usually means this session wrote few business logs.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.serverDiagno: server_diagnostics was not collected: if backend commands failed or services are not initialized, inspect it together with persisted_log_tail and invoke_trace_buffer.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.logStoragePa: log_storage_diagnostics did not provide the current log path: file logging may be disabled, initialization may have failed, or the runtime may not support it.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.relatedLogFi: Detected {{count}} related log files; persisted_log_tail has merged recent log context in chronological order.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.runtimeSnaps: runtime_snapshot was not collected: this export can still analyze logs and invocation traces, but it cannot reflect config, API Key Provider, MCP, or terminal runtime state.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.apiKeyEmpty: The runtime snapshot shows 0 API keys; on first install or incomplete initialization, many operations will not generate additional downstream errors or logs.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.windowsStart: windows_startup_diagnostics was not collected: WebView2, default terminal shell, install directory, and resource directory health cannot be determined.
errors.crashDiagnostic.note.unixShellDet: Detected Unix-style SHELL environment variable: {{shell}}; on a fresh Windows setup this can easily trigger /bin/bash startup failures.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clearHistory.part: Local diagnostic caches were cleared, but historical log file cleanup failed. Retry or export diagnostics again later to confirm.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.copyDia: Failed to copy diagnostics. Retry or use "Export Diagnostic JSON".
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.permiss: Clipboard permission was denied by the system. Allow access and retry, or use "Export Diagnostic JSON".
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.inactiv: The current window is not active. Click the Lime window and retry, or use "Export Diagnostic JSON".
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.fallbac: Failed to copy content. Please retry.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.permiss: Clipboard permission was denied by the system. Allow access and retry.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboard.inactiv: The current window is not active. Click the Lime window and retry.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboardText.tem:
# Lime Diagnostic Request (ready to send to AI)

Act as a senior full-stack engineer. Use the diagnostics below to locate the issue and propose an actionable fix.

## Automatic Summary
{{summary}}

## Your Task
1. Identify the most likely root causes (rank at least 3 by probability)
2. Propose the smallest viable fix (separate frontend/backend notes)
3. Provide validation steps that can be run directly (manual + automated)
4. Mark high-risk change points and rollback plan
5. If information is missing, list the minimum additional details needed

## Output Format
- Root Cause Analysis
- Fix Plan (with key code locations)
- Validation Steps
- Risks and Rollback
- Remaining Information Needed

## Diagnostic Data (JSON)
```json
{{json}}
```

## Reproduction Notes (fill in if needed)
- Path:
- Expected:
- Actual:
- First affected version:
- Frequency:
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboardGuide.ma: Click anywhere in the Lime window, then retry copying.
Open System Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Accessibility, and make sure Lime is enabled.
If it still fails, use "Export Diagnostic JSON" and send it to the developers.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboardGuide.wi: Click anywhere in the Lime window, then retry copying.
Open Settings -> Privacy & security -> Clipboard, and make sure the system clipboard is available.
If enterprise policy restricts clipboard access, use "Export Diagnostic JSON" instead.
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboardGuide.li: Click anywhere in the Lime window, then retry copying.
Check your desktop privacy settings and make sure clipboard access is not blocked.
On Wayland, if it still fails, use "Export Diagnostic JSON".
errors.crashDiagnostic.clipboardGuide.ge: Click anywhere in the Lime window, then retry copying.
Check system privacy settings and make sure clipboard access is not blocked.
If it still fails, use "Export Diagnostic JSON".
errors.crashDiagnostic.downloadDirectory: This environment cannot open the downloads folder automatically. Open your system downloads folder manually.
